SPESTG-480 - Refine DIA exception notification mechanism

Implemented and validated the DIA exception notification mechanism refinement.

Changes included:
- Reused the existing Dataverse repository path for notification handling.
- Added Dataverse configuration lookup for sender and recipient notification settings.
- Added sender queue resolution.
- Added recipient parsing from semicolon-separated configuration values.
- Added activity party creation for sender and recipients.
- Added Dataverse email record creation.
- Added SendEmail execution through Dataverse.
- Added unit test coverage for log-only, missing configuration, missing sender queue, invalid recipient configuration, and happy path email send scenarios.

Validation:
- Build succeeded.
- Unit tests passed: 20/20.
- Latest SPESTG-480 baseline branch has been merged into this branch.
